overview: Genovations Regen provides regenerative treatments including aesthetics, hair restoration, IV therapy, pain management, and wound care. Services range from non-invasive procedures to advanced tissue regeneration therapies.
highlights: Non-invasive and minimally invasive aesthetic procedures
IV therapy for energy and health optimization
Softwave treatment for chronic pain and tissue regeneration
targetAudience: People seeking regenerative treatments for aesthetics, hair restoration, chronic pain relief, and wound healing.
